outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/adadas.R
+++ b/adadas.R
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # ADADAS derivation with bugs to fix:
-# Bug 1: CHG is inverted (should be AVAL - BASE, not BASE - AVAL)
-# Bug 2: ANL01FL is set for all parameters (should be only ACTOT)
-# Bug 3: PCHG divides by wrong variable (should divide by BASE, not AVAL)
+# Bug 1: CHG calculation inverted
+# Bug 2: ANL01FL set for all parameters instead of ACTOT only
+# Bug 3: PCHG divides by AVAL instead of BASE
 
 library(dplyr)
 library(admiral)
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@
   group_by(USUBJID, PARAMCD) %>%
   mutate(
     BASE = if_else(ABLFL == "Y", AVAL, NA_real_),
-    CHG = BASE - AVAL,  # Bug 1: inverted
+    CHG = AVAL - BASE,
     BASE = zoo::na.locf(BASE, na.rm = FALSE)
   ) %>%
   ungroup()
@@ -53,13 +53,13 @@
 # Derive percent change
 adadas <- adadas %>%
   mutate(
-    PCHG = if_else(!is.na(CHG) & !is.na(AVAL) & AVAL != 0, 
-                   CHG / AVAL * 100, NA_real_)  # Bug 3: divides by AVAL
+    PCHG = if_else(!is.na(CHG) & !is.na(BASE) & BASE != 0, 
+                   CHG / BASE * 100, NA_real_)
   )
 
 # Derive analysis flag
 adadas <- adadas %>%
   mutate(
-    ANL01FL = if_else(!is.na(AVAL), "Y", NA_character_)  # Bug 2: set for all
+    ANL01FL = if_else(PARAMCD == "ACTOT" & !is.na(AVAL), "Y", NA_character_)
   )
